component.name: Hyaecord
component.summary: A performance-focused, native-feeling Discord desktop client

description.p: Hyaecord is a from-scratch Discord desktop client for Linux and Windows, built around a compatibility layer for the Equicord/Vencord plugin ecosystem, native GNOME/KDE-adjacent theming, and an event-driven performance core (no polling loops).

Hyaecord is an independent third-party client and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Discord Inc. Using third-party clients is against Discord's Terms of Service; use is at your own discretion.
